name: soma
description: Soma connects Claude Code to a batteries-included RMCP runtime for drop-in provider-backed tools, prompts, and resources.

use_docker.title: Deploy with Docker
use_docker.description: True uses docker compose; false uses a systemd user service.

soma_api_url.title: Service API URL
soma_api_url.description: Optional upstream API URL for dropped-in tools that use the bundled SomaClient compatibility layer. Maps to SOMA_API_URL.

soma_api_key.title: Service API key
soma_api_key.description: Optional upstream API key for dropped-in tools that use the bundled SomaClient compatibility layer. Maps to SOMA_API_KEY.

api_token.title: API token
api_token.description: Optional bearer token for HTTP MCP fallback. Not used by the default stdio connection.

server_url.title: Server URL
server_url.description: Optional HTTP server base URL for remote/platform fallback and health monitoring. The default MCP connection uses local stdio instead.

auth_mode.title: Auth mode
auth_mode.description: Server auth mode. 'bearer' uses only the static API token. 'oauth' enables configured OAuth/OIDC providers and JWT issuance.

no_auth.title: Disable service auth
no_auth.description: Run the MCP server without authentication. ONLY safe when the server is bound to 127.x loopback.

public_url.title: Public URL
public_url.description: Public base URL for OAuth issuer metadata, e.g. https://example.yourdomain.com. Required when auth_mode=oauth.

google_client_id.title: Google OAuth client ID
google_client_id.description: Google OAuth client ID used when auth_mode=oauth.

google_client_secret.title: Google OAuth client secret
google_client_secret.description: Google OAuth client secret from the same Google Cloud Console credential.

auth_admin_email.title: OAuth admin email
auth_admin_email.description: Bootstrap allowed email for OAuth mode, shared by all configured providers.

trace_headers.title: Inbound HTTP trace headers
trace_headers.description: Trusted inbound HTTP trace-header extraction mode. Keep 'off' unless loopback or a trusted gateway strips or overwrites untrusted trace headers; see docs/TRACE_CONTEXT.md.
